title: schoenus asperocarpus
intro: Schoenus asperocarpus, also known as the Rough-fruited Sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues and soothing skin irritations, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
